About events that trigger workflows

Workflow triggers are events that cause a workflow to run.

check_run

Webhook event payload Activity types GITHUB_SHA GITHUB_REF
check_run - created
- rerequested
- completed
- requested_action		 Last commit on default branch Default branch

Runs your workflow when activity related to a check run occurs.

fork

Webhook event payload Activity types GITHUB_SHA GITHUB_REF
fork Not applicable Last commit on default branch Default branch

Runs your workflow when someone forks a repository.

repository_dispatch

Webhook event payload Activity types GITHUB_SHA GITHUB_REF
repository_dispatch Custom Last commit on default branch Default branch

You can use the GitHub API to trigger a webhook event called repository_dispatch.
